_comment: HIDDEN GROUND TRUTH held host-side by the judge — the analog of fieldops' signing key that never enters the sandbox. The BRIEF tells the model the target CONCEPTUALLY ('the 3-qubit GHZ state'); this exact amplitude vector + thresholds are what judge_verify.py grades against and are NOT given to the model during a live run. For a contest, hold this directory out of the model's repo and point the judge at it via QH_REFERENCES_DIR. It is committed here so the public template's judge is exercisable in CI.
